rationale: Trump's confirmed air strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is the most domestically salient event; Beirut strikes and Iran deal remain rhetorical continuation; G7 protests are background noise. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: Trump confirms a US air strike killed the Tren de Aragua leader — a confirmed action with domestic political salience on immigration and security, though limited direct daily-life impact for most Americans.

top_events.title: Trump condemns Israel's Beirut attack, says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Trump rhetoric on Iran deal and Beirut strikes — no signed agreement or confirmed policy change; oil market impact remains speculative.

top_events.title: Thousands protest as world leaders meet for G7 summit
top_events.summary: G7 summit protests are routine background noise; no confirmed policy outcomes affecting US residents' daily life yet.
